title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi with a split AI brain system, Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for multiple applications, and NVIDIA launched the Isaac GR00T platform. The video argues that humanoid robots are transitioning from research demos to practical deployment platforms, with integration of AI, sensing, and physical control as the decisive factor.
